query:
SELECT campaignId, subreddit, COUNT(*) as count 
FROM outreach_leads 
WHERE campaignId = 90001 OR (subreddit IN ('forhire','freelance_forhire') AND campaignId = 1)
GROUP BY campaignId, subreddit
ORDER BY campaignId, count DESC;
